Uses of Class
net.dapete.exceptional.stream.ExIntStream

Packages that use ExIntStream
Package
Description
net.dapete.exceptional.stream
This package provides utilities for handling checked exceptions in Streams.

  • Uses of ExIntStream in net.dapete.exceptional.stream

    Methods in net.dapete.exceptional.stream that return ExIntStream
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.distinct()
     
    static ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.empty()
    Returns an empty instance.
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exDropWhile(ExIntPredicate<?> predicate)
    Equivalent of IntStream.dropWhile(IntPredicate).
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exFilter(ExIntPredicate<?> predicate)
    Equivalent of IntStream.filter(IntPredicate).
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exFlatMap(ExIntFunction<? extends IntStream, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of IntStream.flatMap(IntFunction).
    ExIntStream
    ExStream.exFlatMapToInt(ExFunction<? super T, ? extends IntStream, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.flatMapToInt(Function).
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exMap(ExIntUnaryOperator<?> mapper)
    Equivalent of IntStream.map(IntUnaryOperator).
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exMapMulti(ExIntMapMultiConsumer<?> mapper)
    Equivalent of IntStream.mapMulti(IntStream.IntMapMultiConsumer).
    ExIntStream
    ExStream.exMapMultiToInt(ExBiConsumer<? super T, ? super IntConsumer, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.mapMultiToInt(BiConsumer).
    ExIntStream
    ExDoubleStream.exMapToInt(ExDoubleToIntFunction<?> mapper)
    Equivalent of DoubleStream.mapToInt(DoubleToIntFunction).
    ExIntStream
    ExLongStream.exMapToInt(ExLongToIntFunction<?> mapper)
    Equivalent of LongStream.mapToInt(LongToIntFunction).
    ExIntStream
    ExStream.exMapToInt(ExToIntFunction<? super T, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.mapToInt(ToIntFunction).
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exPeek(ExIntConsumer<?> action)
    Equivalent of IntStream.peek(IntConsumer).
    ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.exTakeWhile(ExIntPredicate<?> predicate)
    Equivalent of IntStream.takeWhile(IntPredicate).

    static ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.of(int t)
    Returns an instance containing a single element.
    static ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.of(int... values)
    Returns an instance whose elements are the specified values.
    static ExIntStream
    ExIntStream.of(IntStream stream)
    Create an instance from an existing IntStream.
